title: G7 summit concludes with discussions on economy and AI and signs of détente among leaders
summary: G7 leaders address economic and artificial intelligence topics, while Macron gifts customized bicycles and Trump adopts a defiant tone.

title: Emperors of Japan attend official ceremony in the Netherlands and honor war victims
summary: The emperors participated in the welcome ceremony and offered flowers at the war memorial, including Japanese prisoners.

title: Proposal to reduce consumption tax on food to 1% starting April 2025
summary: The National Council plan aims to reduce the rate to 1% and supplement with subsidies to achieve an effective zero tax for low-income consumers.

title: Operator of sightseeing boat that sank in Shiretoko in 2022 sentenced to 5 years in prison
summary: The Kushiro court found the captain guilty of negligence in the accident that caused the deaths of 26 people.

title: Yoshii named new manager of the Rakuten Eagles
summary: Former pitcher Yoshii takes over as Rakuten manager, surprising his former teammates in Lotte.

title: All appeals over vote disparity in general elections declared constitutional
summary: The 16 lawsuits seeking to nullify the elections due to inequality in the value of the vote were rejected by the courts.

title: Draft of temporary agreement between US and Iran on Strait of Hormuz leaked
summary: The pact includes the resumption of maritime traffic within 30 days and $300 billion for the reconstruction of Iran.

title: Naphtha shortage forces change in appearance of popular snacks in Japan
summary: Famima's potato chips and Country Maam cookies become black and white due to the lack of naphtha because of the crisis in the Middle East.

title: Nippon Yusen maintains around 10 vessels in the Persian Gulf
summary: The Japanese shipping company continues to operate in the area despite geopolitical tensions.

title: Sanseito introduces bill to create government agency for foreigner policies
summary: The political party proposes unifying the management of foreign residents under a new agency.

title: Russian artist opposed to Putin shot dead in Poland
summary: Polish police detained two Belarusian suspects for the murder of the exiled Russian artist.

title: Pentagon restores name of Pacific Command instead of Indo-Pacific
summary: The name change does not affect the missions or area of responsibility of the command.

title: Messi scores three goals and ties all-time World Cup record
summary: Argentina defeated Algeria with a hat-trick from Messi, reaching 16 goals in World Cups.

title: BBC developing live-action series of 'Kiki's Delivery Service' without Studio Ghibli involvement
summary: The live-action adaptation of the classic anime is in early stages and will not involve the original studio.

title: Suspect arrested for fraud through false returns on PayPay app
summary: The accused allegedly simulated refunds on fraudulent shopping sites to transfer money to his account.

title: Weak magnitude 5 earthquake shakes Kanto region in Japan
summary: The quake was felt in Tokyo and surrounding areas; experts warn of possible aftershocks in the coming hours.

title: Nikkei index closes at new all-time high for third consecutive day
summary: The main indicator of the Tokyo stock market exceeded 70,100 points during the session.

title: Foreign tourist arrivals to Japan fall for second consecutive month in May
summary: The number of visitors from China plummeted 60%, while those from South Korea and Taiwan increased.

title: Chicken and egg prices in Japan reach historically high levels
summary: The rising cost of poultry products is attributed to increased production costs and inflation.

title: Landfill work resumes in Henoko for the construction of the US military base
summary: Despite local opposition, the Japanese government continues with landfill work for the new base.
